hero_badge: Embassy of Arab Cuisine in Moscow
hero_subtitle: Where Arab Cuisine Meets Moscow's Grandeur
hero_desc: Not just a restaurant… but an experience that redraws the map of taste in Russia. Where the authenticity of the Silk Road meets the luxury of Arab hospitality in the heart of Moscow.
about_desc_1: 'Madar' means axis, orbit, centre. That is exactly how the restaurant positions itself — as a crossroads of taste and culture in the heart of Moscow. Where the Silk Road redraws the map of flavour.
about_desc_2: In a capital of luxury and culture, where antiquity meets modernity, a name was born that will be written in the history of hospitality in letters of gold. Moscow has never tasted the Arab world quite like this.
feat1_text: The largest Arab restaurant in Russia by area and capacity, with a royal design blending authentic Arab ornamentation and modern architecture.
feat2_text: Over a hundred dishes from various Arab countries and Central Asia, prepared under the supervision of elite Arab chefs using carefully selected global ingredients.
feat3_text: Exclusive weekly events: Ramadan nights, live Arabic music evenings, and live cooking shows from guest chefs from across the Arab world.
feat4_text: From the Levant to Samarkand, from the Gulf to the Maghreb — every section of the menu tells a regional story and takes you on an unforgettable cultural journey.
feat5_text: Internationally recognised halal certificates and a meticulously monitored supply chain to ensure full compliance with Islamic standards in every dish.
feat6_text: A service team trained to the highest standards, embodying the spirit of genuine Arab hospitality with the professionalism demanded by the Russian and global elite.
dish1_desc: A whole lamb slow-cooked over charcoal with authentic Arab spices for hours until the meat falls apart with sublime tenderness.
dish2_desc: Aleppo-style minced meat kebab with secret spices and grilled vegetables, served on freshly baked hot Arabic bread.
dish3_desc: The famous Samarkand rice with meat, carrots and authentic spices, cooked in a copper cauldron over wood fire.
dish4_desc: Lamb with prunes and almonds in an authentic Moroccan clay tajine, slow-cooked with a fragrant Moroccan spice blend.
dish5_desc: A selection of the finest Lebanese starters: hummus, moutabal, tabbouleh, vine leaves and more — fifteen varieties on one platter.
dish6_desc: A selection of the finest Caspian fish and seafood grilled over charcoal, served with Bukhara rice and Gulf spices.
menu_cta: Book a Table for the Full Menu Experience
halal_desc: At Madar, halal is not merely a certificate — it is a deep-rooted philosophy that begins with the choice of supplier and ends at your table. We guarantee Muslim guests full compliance with the highest Islamic standards.
promise1_text: All ingredients are sourced from certified halal suppliers holding international certificates, with regular inspection visits to ensure compliance.
promise2_text: Our kitchen is entirely designed to halal standards, with complete separation of ingredients and dedicated cooking utensils.
promise3_text: We hold halal certificates from internationally recognised Islamic bodies, with annual renewal and continuous auditing.
exp_desc: Upon entering, you feel as though you are crossing the threshold of a contemporary oriental palace. Crystal chandeliers, authentic Arab ornamentation, velvet fabrics and golden accents harmonise with modern architecture reflecting the spirit of Moscow.
exp1_text: Crystal chandeliers and authentic Arab ornamentation meet contemporary design to create a space that throbs with luxury.
exp2_text: Live Arabic music evenings every week featuring the finest musicians and singers from the Arab world.
exp3_text: A multilingual service team (Arabic, Russian, English) trained to the highest standards of hotel hospitality.
exp4_text: Dedicated VIP rooms for events and private celebrations, with the option to customise the menu and décor.
regions_desc: From the warmth of Levantine cuisine to the authenticity of Gulf mandi, through the flavours of the Arab Maghreb and Egypt's ancient spices and the seasonings of Samarkand — Madar gathers the essence of the most celebrated kitchens under one roof.
region1_text: Mezze, kebab, shawarma, falafel, knafeh — the heart and authentic pulse of Arab cuisine.
region2_text: Mandi, kabsa, harees, madhghout — the luxury of Gulf hospitality with all its spices.
region3_text: Plov, manti, samsa, laghman — the culinary treasures of Central Asia from Samarkand and Bukhara.
region4_text: Couscous, tajine, bastilla, harira — the warm Mediterranean flavours of North Africa.
regions_global_title: A Local Perspective with a Global Touch
regions_global_text: A special section of our menu presents versions of classic Russian dishes with Arab accents — a true bridge between two great cultures.
event1_desc: A live Arabic music evening with the finest musicians, oriental dance performances and a special menu inspired by One Thousand and One Nights.
event2_desc: Watch our legendary chefs prepare the most celebrated dishes right before you, with the cultural story behind each recipe explained.
event3_desc: An unparalleled Ramadan iftar experience in Moscow, featuring a royal buffet of the most famous Arab Ramadan dishes and a spiritual atmosphere uniting Muslims from around the world.
res_desc: Book your table now and step into the gateway of the most luxurious Arab experience in Russia. Our team is ready to make every detail of your occasion perfect.
contact_location_sub: In the heart of the city — exact address coming soon
footer_desc: Embassy of Arab cuisine in the heart of Moscow. Where the authenticity of the Silk Road meets the luxury of Arab hospitality.
footer_quote: "Moscow has never tasted the Arab world quite like this"
mpage_title: Menu | Madar — Embassy of Arab Cuisine in Moscow
mhero_title_en: A Journey Through Arab Culinary Heritage
mhero_desc: A flavour journey across the Arab world and the Silk Road — from the Levant to Samarkand. Every dish is a work of art, crafted from carefully selected ingredients under the guidance of elite Arab chefs.
mcats_body: Seven doors opening onto different culinary worlds — from the royal breakfast to oriental desserts, each chapter a world unto itself.
mcat_meats_desc: Premium grills and meat dishes — Gulf mandi, Aleppan kebab, and celebrated dishes from the finest halal livestock.
mcat_starters_desc: Lebanese mezze, hummus, moutabal and vine leaves — an unforgettable start to every meal.
mcat_seafood_desc: Caspian and Mediterranean fish and seafood grilled with authentic Arab spices.
mcat_salads_desc: Levantine tabbouleh, Lebanese fattoush and Maghreb salads — freshly made daily from the finest ingredients.
mcat_desserts_desc: Nablus knafeh, baklava, umm ali — pastry masterpieces from the memory of the Arab world.
mcat_drinks_desc: Moroccan mint tea, Arabic cardamom coffee, fresh juices and authentic infusions.
mcat_breakfast_desc: Royal Levantine and Arabian breakfast — foul, hummus with oil, eggs with clarified butter and tandoor bread.
mbanner_desc: Every day our chefs curate a special collection of exclusive seasonal dishes, inspired by seasonal ingredients and the living spirit of Arab cuisine.
mhalal1_text: Every dish on our menu is guaranteed halal under internationally recognised certificates.
mhalal2_text: We source our ingredients daily from the finest certified suppliers in Moscow and around the world.
mhalal3_text: Elite Arab chefs who have carried the culinary secrets of their home countries with them.
mhalal4_text: Quality, hygiene and service standards that match the world's finest luxury hotels.
mcp_meats_dish1_desc: A whole lamb slow-cooked over charcoal with authentic Arab spices for hours until the meat melts over fragrant basmati rice.
mcp_meats_dish2_desc: Aleppo-style minced meat kebab with secret spices and grilled vegetables, served on fresh hot Arabic bread with garlic sauce.
mcp_meats_dish3_desc: Fragrant basmati rice with almonds and raisins alongside tender camel meat marinated in a blend of South Arabian spices.
mcp_meats_dish4_desc: Whole wheat cooked with braised lamb and clarified butter with cinnamon — a dish from the memory of the Arab Ramadan.
mcp_meats_dish5_desc: Meat and rice cooked in a clay pot with saffron and cardamom — a traditional Emirati dish fragrant with spice.
mcp_meats_dish6_desc: The famous Samarkand rice with lamb, yellow carrot and authentic spices, cooked in a copper cauldron over wood fire.
mcp_starters_dish1_desc: 15 varieties of the finest Lebanese starters: hummus, moutabal, tabbouleh, vine leaves, raw kibbeh and more — all on one platter.
mcp_starters_dish2_desc: Finely ground hummus with authentic tahini, extra-virgin olive oil, lemon and cumin — the true Levantine way.
mcp_starters_dish3_desc: Crispy falafel of broad beans and chickpeas prepared with fresh herbs, served with tahini sauce and vinegar.
mcp_starters_dish4_desc: Tender vine leaves stuffed with rice, herbs and lemon, cooked in a fresh tomato broth.
mcp_starters_dish5_desc: Authentic Cypriot halloumi grilled over charcoal with home honey and fresh rosemary.
mcp_starters_dish6_desc: Aubergine grilled over charcoal until the skin chars, then blended with tahini, roasted garlic and sharp lemon.
mcp_desserts_dish1_desc: Crispy golden pastry with tender Nablus cheese, drenched in fragrant syrup and garnished with ground Aleppo pistachio.
mcp_desserts_dish2_desc: Thin layers of filo pastry filled with green Aleppo pistachio and clarified butter, soaked in rose-water syrup.
mcp_desserts_dish3_desc: Toasted bread dessert with full-fat whole milk, walnuts, raisins and cream, baked until golden.
mcp_drinks_dish1_desc: Authentic Moroccan green tea poured from a height with fresh mint and rock sugar in a traditional copper teapot.
mcp_drinks_dish2_desc: Arabic coffee prepared over a low flame with green cardamom and saffron, served in a copper pot with Madinah dates.
mcp_drinks_dish3_desc: Fresh red pomegranate juice pressed to order with lemon and rose water, chilled and ready to serve.
mcp_seafood_en: Seafood from the Arabian & Caspian Seas
mcp_seafood_dish1_desc: The finest Caspian fish and seafood grilled over charcoal with Bukhara rice and Gulf spices.
mcp_seafood_dish2_desc: Fresh fish fried in pure oil with roasted garlic and sharp lemon, served with rice and salad.
mcp_seafood_dish3_desc: Fresh royal prawns cooked in butter with roasted garlic, fresh herbs and lemon juice.
mcp_salads_dish1_desc: Fresh parsley with fine bulgur, tomatoes and spring onion, dressed with extra-virgin olive oil and lemon juice.
mcp_salads_dish2_desc: Fresh vegetable salad with crispy Arabic bread and pomegranate molasses — irresistible colour and taste.
mcp_salads_dish3_desc: Tomatoes, peppers, almonds with spicy Moroccan spices and extra-virgin olive oil — North Africa on a plate.
mcp_salads_dish4_desc: Fresh romaine lettuce, grilled chicken breast, Parmesan cheese, croutons and classic Caesar dressing — a hearty complete meal.
mcp_salads_dish5_desc: Crispy romaine, marinated grilled chicken, golden crispy croutons, shaved Parmesan, Caesar dressing with garlic and anchovies — a classic rich in flavours.
mcp_breakfast_dish1_desc: Egyptian foul slowly cooked with olive oil, garlic and lemon, garnished with parsley and fresh tomatoes.
mcp_breakfast_dish2_desc: Eggs fried in authentic Arab clarified butter with salt and black pepper, served with hot tandoor flatbread.
mcp_breakfast_dish3_desc: The royal breakfast platter: foul, hummus, eggs, cheese, fig jam, clarified butter, natural honey with a bread assortment.
